description_long: This object is a whole Hass avocado with a characteristic pear-like shape, featuring a slightly bumpy, textured skin. The skin is predominantly dark green with lighter green speckles and a few small brownish spots scattered across the surface. At the top, a small, circular stem scar is visible, indicating where the fruit was attached to the tree. The surface appears matte with a semi-soft firmness, typical of a fresh avocado. The overall form is symmetrical, tapering gently from a broad base to a narrower top. There are no visible cut marks or signs of handling, and the avocado is presented in isolation.
description: A whole, dark green Hass avocado with a bumpy, speckled skin and a visible stem scar at the top.
description_view_0: Front view showing the broadest part of the avocado with a smooth, uninterrupted green surface and subtle speckling.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated, this view highlights the gentle tapering toward the top and a few small dark spots.
description_view_2: This angle reveals the stem scar at the top and more pronounced speckling on the skin.
description_view_3: Back view with the stem scar visible and a slightly darker, more textured surface with minor blemishes.
attribute_skin_blemishes: small dark spots and minor surface irregularities
